sections.title: 第一部分：單題（第1-23題，共23題）

items.question: Look at the picture.  The man is holding a ___ of grapes in his hands.
items.explanation: 圖片顯示攤販手持裝有葡萄的編織籃（basket），故選 (B)。

items.question: Dennis enjoys ___ in public.  He is proud of his beautiful voice.
items.explanation: 擁有美麗聲音（beautiful voice）表示他愛唱歌（singing），故選 (D)。

items.question: Mrs. Johnson can't hear very well.  If you need to talk to her, you must ___.
items.explanation: Mrs. Johnson 聽力不好，跟她說話必須大聲（shout），故選 (D)。

items.question: People got very excited when they watched Ms. Smith ___ at the party.
items.explanation: watch + 受詞 + Ving 表示親眼看見動作進行中，故選 (B) dancing。

items.question: I tried on these shoes in several different ___, and I thought the white pair looked best on me.
items.explanation: 「覺得白色那雙最好看」暗示她試穿了不同顏色（colors）的鞋子，故選 (A)。

items.question: Rex did not feel the earthquake this morning.  He ___ in the park at the time.
items.explanation: at the time 搭配過去進行式，表示地震時正在進行的動作，故選 (B) was jogging。

items.question: Mr. Lee has worked in the same store for ten years; he's never thought about ___ his job.
items.explanation: 在同一家店工作十年，從未考慮過換工作（changing his job），故選 (A)。

items.question: I didn't take the bus today because it was ___.  All the seats were taken and a lot of students were standing.
items.explanation: 所有座位都有人坐、還有學生站著，表示公車客滿（full），故選 (C)。

items.question: Don't go away when you're cooking, ___ the food might burn.
items.explanation: 「別走開，否則（or）食物可能燒焦」，用 or 表示若不聽警告的後果，故選 (C)。

items.question: Jerry wanted to know ___ he was kicked off the soccer team, but no one gave him a good reason.
items.explanation: 想知道被踢出球隊的原因，用 why（為什麼），故選 (D)。

items.question: Jenny is already forty, doesn't have a job and often makes trouble for her parents.  To them, she is really a(n) ___.
items.explanation: Jenny 常給父母製造麻煩，對他們來說是個頭痛（headache）的問題人物，故選 (D)。

items.question: Ed and Jill ___ camping this weekend, so they have to finish their homework by Friday.
items.explanation: this weekend 是未來時間，are going (to) 表示已計畫的未來，故選 (C)。

items.question: Doraemon, a blue Japanese robot cat, has hated mice since his ears ___ by a mouse.
items.explanation: 耳朵被老鼠咬，受詞承受動作，用被動語態過去式 were bitten，故選 (C)。

items.question: If we play some interesting games in class, there ___ more fun in learning English.
items.explanation: If 條件句搭配未來式，且 there will be... 是正確句型，故選 (C) will be。

items.question: The ___ of this shop was so bad; I never got any answer after I emailed them my questions.
items.explanation: 寄出問題後都沒有收到回覆，表示這間店的服務（service）很差，故選 (D)。

items.question: It's not easy to see those islands clearly from here on sunny days, and it's even less ___ to see them on cloudy days.
items.explanation: 晴天就很難看清，陰天更不可能（even less possible）看到，故選 (C)。

items.question: Do you remember the CD I was looking for for months?  I ___ found it in a small shop.  Look, here it is!
items.explanation: 找了好幾個月後終於（finally）找到，故選 (C)。

items.question: Business at Jane's shop has not been good these days.  And the new supermarket across the street only makes things ___.
items.explanation: 生意已不好，新超市又來競爭，只會讓情況更糟（worse），故選 (B)。

items.question: Scott wasn't sure if the young woman before him was ___ pulled him out of a car on fire.
optionsZh: 那個曾經的人（關係子句）
items.explanation: "the one who" 引導關係子句修飾 the young woman，表示「就是那個把他從著火車中救出的人」，故選 (D)。

items.question: I ___ swimming for several years before I went to this high school.  I gave it up because of heavy schoolwork.
items.explanation: before I went to this high school 是過去的時間點，描述此前已進行數年的動作，用過去式 practiced，故選 (C)。

items.question: Frank Kane is so good in the movie that many people ___ he will win the best actor prize.
items.explanation: 許多人「預期」（expect）他將獲得最佳男主角獎，故選 (A)。

items.question: The new medicine that just came out on the market ___ thousands of lives.
items.explanation: 新藥已上市並已拯救了成千上萬的生命，用現在完成式 has saved，故選 (B)。

items.question: Now I often think of those days with Pip, my pet dog.  When I read in my room, he ___ quietly beside me.
optionsZh: 過去常常來坐（過去習慣）
items.explanation: Now I often think of those days 表示 Pip 已不在，描述已逝去的過去習慣，用 used to，故選 (D)。

sections.title: 第二部分：題組（第24-43題，共20題）

questions.question: Amy went to Four Seasons' Kitchen with her mother after she collected 15 stars.  They ordered two Garden Sandwiches, an Autumn Wind, and a Winter Snow.  After using the stars, how much did they pay for their meals?
questions.explanation: 兩份Garden Sandwich ($80×2=$160) + Autumn Wind ($60) + Winter Snow ($70) = $290。集滿15顆星可免費換一杯$60飲料，扣掉Autumn Wind後共付 $290-$60=$230，故選 (B)。

questions.question: Amy wants to bring her friends to Four Seasons' Kitchen in August.  She looks at her calendar to pick a time to go there.  Which are the time and date she can choose?
questions.explanation: 營業時間為週二至週日 14:00-20:00，逢週一及每月第二個週日公休。8/1=週二但20:30已超過打烊；8/11=週五17:00✓；8/13=8月第二個週日公休✗；8/28=週一公休✗，故選 (B)。

passages.caption: 發現離巢幼鳥時的處理指引

questions.question: According to the notes, which is the WRONG way to help a baby bird that is out of its nest?
options: Feed it before you take it to a hospital.
Leave it alone if it is not hurt and has feathers.
Call the animal center if you can't find its nest.
Put it back in its nest if it is not hurt and has few feathers.
optionsZh: 若未受傷且有羽毛，讓牠待在原地
找不到鳥巢時打電話給動物中心
若未受傷且羽毛稀少，把牠放回鳥巢
questions.explanation: 指引明確說明：幼鳥受傷時「保持溫暖，不要給任何食物（don't give it any food）」後送動物醫院，故餵食是錯誤做法，選 (A)。

questions.question: According to the notes, what do birds do if their babies have the smell of people on them?
options: They keep taking care of them.
They push them out of the nest.
They clean them until the smell goes away.
They leave them behind and move to a new nest.
optionsZh: 清理牠們直到氣味消失
遺棄牠們並搬到新的鳥巢
questions.explanation: 指引特別指出這是錯誤迷思：「人們以為鳥兒若感覺到幼鳥有人類氣味就會放棄牠們——錯！鳥兒才不在乎呢！」牠們會繼續照顧，故選 (A)。

passages.caption: 從農場到餐桌：五大食物浪費階段及2014年各地區各階段浪費比例圖

questions.question: According to the reading, which is one of the reasons for food waste?
options: Stores do not know how to pack food well.
Farmers do not have enough machines to collect food.
There is no refrigerator on the truck to keep food fresh.
Factories do not have enough trucks to carry food to stores.
optionsZh: 店家不知道如何妥善包裝食物
農夫沒有足夠機器採收食物
卡車上沒有冰箱保鮮食物
工廠沒有足夠卡車將食物運到店家
questions.explanation: 第二階段（運送途中）的原因之一是「卡車上沒有冰箱保鮮食物（No refrigerator on the truck）」，故選 (C)。

questions.question: Which is true about food waste at each stage in the three parts of the world?
options: For each area, the highest percentage of food waste happens at Stage 5.
Europe has a lower percentage of food waste at Stage 3 than the other two areas.
North America & Oceania has a higher percentage of food waste at Stage 1 than Europe.
South & Southeast Asia has a higher percentage of food waste at Stage 4 than the other two areas.
optionsZh: 各地區食物浪費最高比例均出現在第五階段
歐洲在第三階段（工廠）的食物浪費比例低於其他兩個地區
北美暨大洋洲在第一階段（農場）的食物浪費比例高於歐洲
南亞暨東南亞在第四階段（店家）的食物浪費比例高於其他兩個地區
questions.explanation: 圖表顯示南亞暨東南亞在第四階段（店家）的浪費比例高於北美暨大洋洲和歐洲，故選 (D)。

questions.question: What is the trick that the mosquito uses in rain?
options: It shakes its body fast enough to get water off.
It drops with the raindrop and then rolls off it.
It flies behind the raindrop and pushes it away.
It rides on the raindrop and lands on the ground.
optionsZh: 飛到雨滴後面把它推開
questions.explanation: 蚊子被雨滴擊中後與其一起下落約6公分，接著滾離並飛走，故選 (B)。

questions.question: What keeps a mosquito safe in the rain?
options: It is as big as a raindrop.
It is strong enough to fight the force of a raindrop.
optionsZh: 力量足以對抗雨滴衝擊
questions.explanation: 蚊子體重僅0.002g，因為極輕所以被雨滴擊中時受到的力量不足以致命，故選 (A)。

questions.question: When would it be dangerous for a mosquito in the rain?
options: When it flies too close to the ground.
When the rain falls too hard and too fast.
When it is hit by raindrops too many times.
When it drops for more than 6 cm in the rain.
optionsZh: 在雨中下落超過6公分時
questions.explanation: 蚊子飛得太低時被雨滴擊中，來不及飛離就會撞到地面而死，故選 (A)。

questions.question: What do the three stories in the reading all talk about?
optionsZh: 誰彈「給愛麗絲」彈得最好
貝多芬為何寫「給愛麗絲」
questions.explanation: 三個故事各自提出不同說法，說明貝多芬為誰/為何寫這首曲子，主題都是「為什麼寫」，故選 (D)。

questions.question: What do we know about "For Elise" from the reading?
options: It first appeared in the opera Fidelio.
The manuscript was found after Beethoven died.
The manuscript is now kept by the city of Vienna.
optionsZh: 最早出現在歌劇《菲德里奧》中
手稿在貝多芬去世後才被發現
手稿現由維也納市保管
questions.explanation: 文章說「直到1867年才有人知道這首曲子，當時手稿才被發現，距貝多芬去世已40年」，故選 (C)。

questions.question: What can we learn about the three women from the stories?
options: They were called "Elise" by their friends.
Elisabeth Röckel was a close friend of Beethoven's.
Therese Malfatti changed "For Elise" to "For Therese."
optionsZh: 她們都被朋友稱為「愛麗絲」
Therese Malfatti把「給愛麗絲」改成「給泰瑞絲」
questions.explanation: 文中說 Röckel 和貝多芬「兩人成為非常好的朋友（became very good friends）」；是一名男子後來把手稿誤寫成「For Elise」（非Malfatti改的）；Barensfeld 是向 Malfatti 學琴（非貝多芬的學生），故選 (B)。

questions.question: What idea does Jesse Cohen talk about in the reading?
options: Not all kinds of toys are helpful for children's learning.
Parents should give their children the right toys for their age.
Children should learn about their gender from playing with toys.
We should not let gender decide which toys children can play with.
optionsZh: 並非所有玩具都有助於孩子學習
父母應給孩子適齡玩具
孩子應透過玩具了解性別
我們不應讓性別決定孩子玩哪種玩具
questions.explanation: 文章核心論點：性別不應該決定孩子玩什麼玩具，玩各種玩具有助於發現興趣和潛力，故選 (D)。

questions.question: In the third paragraph, why does Jesse Cohen think "this rule can be bad for children"?
options: Children may not want to share their toys with others.
Children may have the wrong idea about following rules.
Children may not be able to learn from playing with toys.
Children may miss the chance to find out what they really like.
optionsZh: 孩子可能不想和別人分享玩具
孩子可能對遵守規則有錯誤認知
孩子可能無法從玩玩具中學習
孩子可能錯失發現自己真正喜愛的機會
questions.explanation: 文中說「只玩一種玩具，可能失去探索自己興趣的重要機會（lose this important chance）」，故選 (D)。

questions.question: In the reading, after Jesse Cohen talks about an idea, he often gives an example to make it clear.  Below are four of the sentences in the third paragraph.  Which is used as an example?
options: "However, this rule can be bad for children."
"Dolls help with their early language use, and building toys are good for learning math and science."
"Some doctors worry that children may use the same kind of thinking when they look for jobs in the future."
"If they do, they may miss something more important than just getting a chance to play with different toys."
optionsZh: 「然而，這個規則對孩子有害。」（提出論點）
「玩偶有助於語言發展，積木有益於數學和科學學習。」（具體例子）
「一些醫生擔心孩子找工作時也會用同樣的思維。」（延伸影響）
「如果這樣，他們可能錯過比玩玩具更重要的事。」（結論）
questions.explanation: 作者說「不同玩具教不同東西」後，緊接著用「玩偶幫助語言、積木幫助數學科學」作為具體範例（example），故選 (B)。

questions.question: What is the reading mostly about?
optionsZh: Marie Colvin在耶魯的求學時光
questions.explanation: 文章完整描述了 Colvin 從耶魯決定成為記者到在霍姆斯殉職的整段職業生涯，故選 (B)。

questions.question: What does it mean when someone has empathy?
options: They are good at taking war photos.
They like to read other people's life stories.
They are able to understand how other people feel.
They are good at helping people change their own lives.
optionsZh: 喜歡閱讀他人的人生故事
擅長幫助人們改變自己的生活
questions.explanation: 文章描述她的 empathy：她寫真實的人與生活，讓讀者「感受如同親身經歷」，即能理解他人感受，故選 (C)。

questions.question: Which is true about Marie Colvin?
options: The chance to study at Yale made her leave her job in the Middle East.
The experience in Sri Lanka did not change her way of reporting news.
She was killed in Homs when she was interviewing soldiers there for her report.
She was not sure what to do in the future until she worked for the Sunday Times.
optionsZh: 到耶魯讀書的機會讓她辭去中東工作
斯里蘭卡的經歷沒有改變她的報導方式
她在霍姆斯採訪士兵時遭到殺害
直到在星期日泰晤士報工作後才確定未來方向
questions.explanation: 她在斯里蘭卡失去左眼，但「從未停止，仍然前往危險之地」——說明她的報導方式沒有改變；其他選項均與文章內容不符，故選 (B)。

questions.question: I just love Josh Katz's new book! It's about ___ in different parts of the US.
options: what words are often spelled differently
optionsZh: 哪些字的拼法常有差異
questions.explanation: 書中探討美國各地對同一事物的不同稱呼（如球鞋：tennis shoes/sneakers/gym shoes），故選 (A) what things are called。

questions.question: The use of words tells us where people are from, like Katz's book says. But in my experience, it also shows ___.
options: whether they are men or women
questions.explanation: 作者一家住在紐約，但祖父用舊英式說法 plimsolls，作者說 sneakers，女兒說現代潮語 kicks/vans——不同世代用不同說法，顯示年齡（how old they are），故選 (A)。
